name: SIS Pantai Indah Kapuk

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Mandara Indah IV, Pantai Indah Kapuk, Penjaringan, Jakarta Utara 14460, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: SIS Pantai Indah Kapuk is part of the SIS group (alongside SIS Kelapa Gading and other campuses) and follows a Singapore curriculum.
paragraphs: SIS Pantai Indah Kapuk is part of the SIS group (alongside SIS Kelapa Gading and other campuses) and follows a Singapore curriculum.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$3.7K – US$13K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Swimming pool, Basketball courts, Science laboratories, Library, IT labs.

metaDescription: SIS Pantai Indah Kapuk (North Jakarta). SIS Pantai Indah Kapuk is part of the SIS group (alongside SIS Kelapa Gading and other campuses) and follows a Singapore curriculum.…
